results.title: Saira Banu Remembers Dilip Kumar On Fifth Death Anniversary: He Was Steadfast Anchor Of My Life
results.description: Veteran Bollywood actress Saira Banu today, July 7, paid tribute to her late husband, actor Dilip Kumar. The actress shared a series of pictures with an emotional caption remembering him. Read below now!

results.title: Strategic Leap: India and Indonesia Ink Landmark Defense Deals on BrahMos, Astra Missiles, and Sabang Port Development
results.description: In a historic move poised to reshape the geopolitical landscape of the Indo-Pacific, India and Indonesia have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) focused on the procurement of India’s BrahMos and Astra missile systems. The groundbreaking agreement was finalized during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s official bilateral visit to Indonesia from July 6 to 8, underscoring [...]

results.title: ‘Kya aap the wahan par?’: Bhagyashree fires back at trolls for calling her lassi promotion video fake
results.description: Bhagyashree shared another video of herself enjoying kulhad lassi and addressed trolls saying that earlier she did a fake promotional video in Kashi.

results.title: 1,100 Trees Collapse In A Week, 500 In A Day In Mumbai Rain, 3 Killed
results.description: A tree fell on a school bus in Chembur killing a student on June 30

results.title: Father Arrested For Killing 11-Month-Old Daughter; Absconding Mother Alleges Bengaluru Police Torture
results.description: या प्रकरणात संबंधित व्यक्तीवर आणि त्याच्या पत्नीवर गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. तसंच पत्नी अटकेपासून पळ काढत आहे, असं पोलिसांनी म्हटलं आहे.
